storage_policy: Store finite values in canonical absolute units; never store normalized values in the canonical sample.
fit_population: training subjects only after patient-level split
rules: A shared value projection without a template-aware normalization key is illegal.
A duration value is a discrete observed-hour or active-hour burden unless the source provides reliable continuous intervals.
Zero is retained when it is a valid observed count, amount, duration, or state.
No statistic may be fitted on validation or test subjects.
Canonical sample values are never rounded by the builder.
